languages.original_text: "A cursory medicae scan shows a level of mental exhaustion that poses serious risks for you, Mistress Tlass. Is the manifestation of psychic phenomena imminent?"

languages.text: "Беглое медике сканирование показывает опасный для вас уровень психического истощения, госпожа Тласс. Есть ли риски проявления психических феноменов?"
"A cursory medicae scan shows a level of mental exhaustion that poses serious risks for you, Mistress Tlass. Is the manifestation of psychic phenomena imminent?"

languages.text: «Un escaneo rápido de medicae muestra un nivel de agotamiento mental que supone un verdadero riesgo para su salud, señora Tlass. ¿Se manifestarán fenómenos psíquicos en breve?».
languages.original_text: "A cursory medicae scan shows a level of mental exhaustion that poses serious risks for you, Mistress Tlass. Is the manifestation of psychic phenomena imminent?"

traits.locale_text: «Un escaneo rápido de medicae muestra un nivel de agotamiento mental que supone un verdadero riesgo para su salud, señora Tlass. ¿Se manifestarán fenómenos psíquicos en breve?».

languages.text: 「ざっとメディカエ走査をしたところ、あなたには深刻な危険をもたらす水準の精神的疲弊が見受けられます、トラス女史。超能力現象の発現が間近に迫っているのでしょうか？」
languages.original_text: "A cursory medicae scan shows a level of mental exhaustion that poses serious risks for you, Mistress Tlass. Is the manifestation of psychic phenomena imminent?"

traits.locale_text: 「ざっとメディカエ走査をしたところ、あなたには深刻な危険をもたらす水準の精神的疲弊が見受けられます、トラス女史。超能力現象の発現が間近に迫っているのでしょうか？」

languages.text: “初步医疗扫描结果显示，你的精神疲劳等级已达危险边缘，特拉斯女士。灵能异象是否即将显化？”
languages.original_text: "A cursory medicae scan shows a level of mental exhaustion that poses serious risks for you, Mistress Tlass. Is the manifestation of psychic phenomena imminent?"

traits.locale_text: “初步医疗扫描结果显示，你的精神疲劳等级已达危险边缘，特拉斯女士。灵能异象是否即将显化？”

languages.text: "Ein oberflächlicher Medicae-Scan hat für Euch überaus riskante mentale Erschöpfung gezeigt, Meisterin Tlass. Droht die Manifestation psychischer Phänomene?"
languages.original_text: "A cursory medicae scan shows a level of mental exhaustion that poses serious risks for you, Mistress Tlass. Is the manifestation of psychic phenomena imminent?"

traits.locale_text: "Ein oberflächlicher Medicae-Scan hat für Euch überaus riskante mentale Erschöpfung gezeigt, Meisterin Tlass. Droht die Manifestation psychischer Phänomene?"

languages.text: « Une analyse de medicae sommaire révèle un niveau d'épuisement mental représentant un véritable danger pour vous, maîtresse Tlass. La manifestation d'un phénomène psychique serait-elle imminente ? »
languages.original_text: "A cursory medicae scan shows a level of mental exhaustion that poses serious risks for you, Mistress Tlass. Is the manifestation of psychic phenomena imminent?"

traits.locale_text: « Une analyse de medicae sommaire révèle un niveau d'épuisement mental représentant un véritable danger pour vous, maîtresse Tlass. La manifestation d'un phénomène psychique serait-elle imminente ? »

languages.text: "Kısa bir tıbbi tarama, sizin için ciddi riskler oluşturan bir zihinsel yorgunluk seviyesi gösteriyor Üstat Tlass. Ruhsezi olaylarının tezahür etmesi an meselesi mi?"
